---
title: "Life Outside Work"
---

<div style="max-width: 1200px; margin: 40px auto;">

I am a hobbyist photographer, a virtual pilot, and an active air traffic controller on [VATSIM](https://www.vatsim.net){target="_blank"}.

<div id="photo-gallery" style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 15px; max-width: 900px; margin: auto;">

<figure style="margin: 0;">
<a href="photos/PXL_20220323_021751755.jpg" target="_blank">
<img src="photos/PXL_20220323_021751755.jpg" style="width:100%;" loading="lazy">
</a>
<figcaption style="text-align:center; color:gray; font-size:0.9rem;">Sunset panoramic view of downtown Seattle with Mt. Rainier in the background</figcaption>
</figure>

<figure style="margin: 0;">
<a href="photos/IMG_1405.jpg" target="_blank">
<img src="photos/IMG_1405.jpg" style="width:100%;" loading="lazy">
</a>
<figcaption style="text-align:center; color:gray; font-size:0.9rem;">Coal Creek, Washington</figcaption>
</figure>

<figure style="margin: 0;">
<a href="photos/PXL_20211226_185354224.jpg" target="_blank">
<img src="photos/PXL_20211226_185354224.jpg" style="width:100%;" loading="lazy">
</a>
<figcaption style="text-align:center; color:gray; font-size:0.9rem;">The Quad at the University of Washington</figcaption>
</figure>

<figure style="margin: 0;">
<a href="photos/PXL_20220731_064619756.NIGHT~2.jpg" target="_blank">
<img src="photos/PXL_20220731_064619756.NIGHT~2.jpg" style="width:100%;" loading="lazy">
</a>
<figcaption style="text-align:center; color:gray; font-size:0.9rem;"></figcaption>
</figure>

<figure style="margin: 0;">
<a href="photos/PXL_20221023_004339139.jpg" target="_blank">
<img src="photos/PXL_20221023_004339139.jpg" style="width:100%;" loading="lazy">
</a>
<figcaption style="text-align:center; color:gray; font-size:0.9rem;"></figcaption>
</figure>

<figure style="margin: 0;">
<a href="photos/PXL_20240101_221804405.jpg" target="_blank">
<img src="photos/PXL_20240101_221804405.jpg" style="width:100%;" loading="lazy">
</a>
<figcaption style="text-align:center; color:gray; font-size:0.9rem;">Drumheller Foundation at the UW</figcaption>
</figure>

<figure style="margin: 0;">
<a href="photos/PXL_20240418_010033230~2.jpg" target="_blank">
<img src="photos/PXL_20240418_010033230~2.jpg" style="width:100%;" loading="lazy">
</a>
<figcaption style="text-align:center; color:gray; font-size:0.9rem;"></figcaption>
</figure>

<figure style="margin: 0;">
<a href="photos/PXL_20240922_014702847.LONG_EXPOSURE-01.COVER.jpg" target="_blank">
<img src="photos/PXL_20240922_014702847.LONG_EXPOSURE-01.COVER.jpg" style="width:100%;" loading="lazy">
</a>
<figcaption style="text-align:center; color:gray; font-size:0.9rem;"></figcaption>
</figure>

<figure style="margin: 0;">
<a href="photos/PXL_20250514_231324573.jpg" target="_blank">
<img src="photos/PXL_20250514_231324573.jpg" style="width:100%;" loading="lazy">
</a>
<figcaption style="text-align:center; color:gray; font-size:0.9rem;"></figcaption>
</figure>

<figure style="margin: 0;">
<a href="photos/PXL_20250514_231425261~2.jpg" target="_blank">
<img src="photos/PXL_20250514_231425261~2.jpg" style="width:100%;" loading="lazy">
</a>
<figcaption style="text-align:center; color:gray; font-size:0.9rem;"></figcaption>
</figure>

<figure style="margin: 0;">
<a href="photos/srivatsan-balaji-8L18q92WX8g-unsplash.jpg" target="_blank">
<img src="photos/srivatsan-balaji-8L18q92WX8g-unsplash.jpg" style="width:100%;" loading="lazy">
</a>
<figcaption style="text-align:center; color:gray; font-size:0.9rem;"></figcaption>
</figure>

<figure style="margin: 0;">
<a href="photos/srivatsan-balaji-Hv76ddFqKH4-unsplash.jpg" target="_blank">
<img src="photos/srivatsan-balaji-Hv76ddFqKH4-unsplash.jpg" style="width:100%;" loading="lazy">
</a>
<figcaption style="text-align:center; color:gray; font-size:0.9rem;"></figcaption>
</figure>

<figure style="margin: 0;">
<a href="photos/srivatsan-balaji-NN6gNzLlfEM-unsplash.jpg" target="_blank">
<img src="photos/srivatsan-balaji-NN6gNzLlfEM-unsplash.jpg" style="width:100%;" loading="lazy">
</a>
<figcaption style="text-align:center; color:gray; font-size:0.9rem;"></figcaption>
</figure>

<figure style="margin: 0;">
<a href="photos/srivatsan-balaji-T632eMad9E8-unsplash.jpg" target="_blank">
<img src="photos/srivatsan-balaji-T632eMad9E8-unsplash.jpg" style="width:100%;" loading="lazy">
</a>
<figcaption style="text-align:center; color:gray; font-size:0.9rem;"></figcaption>
</figure>

<figure style="margin: 0;">
<a href="photos/srivatsan-balaji-vvpqI98fT60-unsplash.jpg" target="_blank">
<img src="photos/srivatsan-balaji-vvpqI98fT60-unsplash.jpg" style="width:100%;" loading="lazy">
</a>
<figcaption style="text-align:center; color:gray; font-size:0.9rem;"></figcaption>
</figure>

<figure style="margin: 0;">
<a href="photos/srivatsan-balaji-WCjeeeBJEH4-unsplash.jpg" target="_blank">
<img src="photos/srivatsan-balaji-WCjeeeBJEH4-unsplash.jpg" style="width:100%;" loading="lazy">
</a>
<figcaption style="text-align:center; color:gray; font-size:0.9rem;"></figcaption>
</figure>

<figure style="margin: 0;">
<a href="photos/srivatsan-balaji-wZMVYtJXHm0-unsplash.jpg" target="_blank">
<img src="photos/srivatsan-balaji-wZMVYtJXHm0-unsplash.jpg" style="width:100%;" loading="lazy">
</a>
<figcaption style="text-align:center; color:gray; font-size:0.9rem;"></figcaption>
</figure>

</div>

<script>
document.querySelectorAll('#photo-gallery figure img').forEach(img => {
  const figure = img.closest('figure');
  if (img.complete) {
    if (img.naturalWidth > img.naturalHeight * 1.4) {
      figure.style.gridColumn = 'span 2';
    }
  } else {
    img.addEventListener('load', () => {
      if (img.naturalWidth > img.naturalHeight * 1.4) {
        figure.style.gridColumn = 'span 2';
      }
    });
  }
});
</script>

</div>
